commands.cmd:
printf '{"results":['
sep=""
for ep in database:5432 cache:6379; do
  host=${ep%%:*}; port=${ep##*:}
  if nc -z -w 3 "$host" "$port" 2>/dev/null; then
    reachable=true
  else
    reachable=false
  fi
  printf '%s{"endpoint":"%s","reachable":%s}' "$sep" "$ep" "$reachable"
  sep=","
done
printf ']}'
